title: Acme SaaS - Build Your Brand System

hero.h1: Build your brand in weeks, not months
hero.subHeadline: Our proven system helps B2B companies establish a professional brand identity that converts visitors into customers.

problem.headline: Sound familiar?
bullets: Your brand feels inconsistent across channels and touchpoints
Designers spend hours recreating the same components from scratch
Your marketing team can't produce on-brand content without bottlenecks
Competitors with polished brands are winning deals you should be closing

features.benefit: Consistent colors, typography, and spacing across all touchpoints — from website to social media.
Pre-built templates for landing pages, social posts, and presentations your team can use immediately.
A comprehensive digital brand guide that keeps everyone aligned on your visual identity.
AI-powered copy generation that matches your brand voice for consistent messaging at scale.
Lightning-fast static sites deployed anywhere — Vercel, Netlify, or your own servers.
Download your entire brand system as a ZIP file that works offline, no dependencies.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We learn about your brand, audience, and goals through a structured intake process.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Our system generates a complete brand identity with tokens, templates, and guidelines.

steps.title: Review
steps.description: You review and refine the output. We iterate until everything is perfect.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.description: Receive your brand system as a static site, PDF brand book, and downloadable package.

testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.quote: The brand system transformed how we present ourselves. Our conversion rate increased 34% within the first month.

testimonials.name: Marcus Rivera
testimonials.quote: We went from zero brand consistency to a professional identity in just three weeks. Game changer.

testimonials.name: Emily Zhang
testimonials.quote: The design tokens alone saved our team 15 hours per week. Everything is consistent and beautiful.

items.question: How long does the process take?
items.answer: Typically 3-4 weeks from kickoff to delivery for the Starter plan, and 4-6 weeks for Professional and Enterprise.

items.question: Do I need a designer on my team?
items.answer: No. Our system generates everything automatically from your brand inputs. Your team just needs to provide content and feedback.

items.question: Can I customize the templates after delivery?
items.answer: Absolutely. All templates use standard HTML/CSS with design tokens, so any developer can modify them.

items.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the results?
items.answer: We offer unlimited revisions during the review phase. If you're still not happy, we provide a full refund within 30 days.

items.question: Do you support multiple languages?
items.answer: Yes. The template system supports any language. Copy can be generated in English, Portuguese, Spanish, and more.

items.question: Where are the sites hosted?
items.answer: Sites are static and can be deployed anywhere — Vercel, Netlify, GitHub Pages, AWS S3, or your own servers.

items.question: How does the AI copy pipeline work?
items.answer: Our pipeline uses your brand voice profile to generate on-brand copy for social media, landing pages, and marketing materials.

items.question: Can I upgrade my plan later?
items.answer: Yes. You can upgrade at any time and only pay the difference. All your existing assets carry over.

finalCta.headline: Ready to transform your brand?
finalCta.riskRemoval: 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with the results, we'll revise until you are — or your money back.
